slides.name: Title Description Bullet List
slides.description: A clean two-column layout with a main title and description on the left, and up to 5 bullet points on the right. Each bullet has a heading and a short description. Ideal for key takeaways, feature highlights, or structured lists with context.

title.description: The main title of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.
description.description: The main paragraph description on the slide

default.heading: Market expansion
default.description: Prioritize high-growth verticals and geographic regions with strong demand.

default.heading: Customer retention
default.description: Reduce churn through proactive support and tailored success programs.

default.heading: Product innovation
default.description: Ship features that align with top customer requests and usage data.

default.heading: Operational efficiency
default.description: Automate repetitive workflows to free capacity for strategic work.

default.heading: Team enablement
default.description: Invest in training and tools so teams can execute at scale.

bullets.description: A list of up to 5 bullet points, each with a heading and description

heading.description: The heading for this bullet point

description.description: The description for this bullet point

slides.name: Title Description Contact List
slides.description: A slide featuring a title and description on the left with up to 3 icon-enhanced contact items on the right. Each item has an icon, label, and value.

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.

slides.name: Title Description Dual Metrics Grid
slides.description: A slide featuring a title and description on the left, with two columns of metric cards on the right - primary metrics in bold styling and secondary metrics in subtle styling. Supports up to 6 metrics total (3 per column).

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.

slides.name: Title Description Icon Timeline
slides.description: A slide featuring a title and description on the left with a vertical list of icon-enhanced items on the right. Each item has a circular icon, heading, and description.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.

processItems.description: A list of up to 5 items

subDescription.description: The sub description of the item

slides.name: Title Description Image Right
slides.description: A two-column slide with a title and description on the left and a large featured image on the right. The balanced layout provides equal emphasis on textual content and visual representation.

title.description: The main title of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.
description.description: The body text or description of the slide

default.__image_prompt__: Close up of diverse business hands joined together in a circle, representing teamwork and partnership.

image.description: The large image displayed on the right side of the slide

__image_url__.description: The URL of the featured image

__image_prompt__.description: A description for generating a replacement image

slides.name: Title Description Metrics Chart
slides.description: A slide featuring a main title, description, metric cards grid on the left, and a chart panel on the right. Supports bar, grouped bar, stacked bar, clustered bar, diverging bar, horizontal bar, line, area, pie, donut, and scatter chart types.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.

metricCards.description: List of metric cards displayed in a grid

heading.description: Label text for the metric card

value.description: Value displayed in the metric card

chartFooterLabel.description: Footer label text for the chart

chartData.description: The data used to render the chart

columns.description: Names of the chart data series

rows.description: The data rows for the chart

value2.description: The second series value (optional for single-series charts)

slides.name: Title Description Metrics Image
slides.description: A slide featuring a title, description, and 2x2 metrics grid on the left with a large vertical image on the right. The alternating metric cards create visual hierarchy.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

description.default: A clean professional slide featuring a title, description, a 2x2 grid of highlight metrics, and a large vertical image on the right.

metrics.description: Collection of metric items displayed in a grid

image.description: The primary visual image displayed on the right side of the slide.

default.__image_prompt__: A professional business collaboration scene with people putting their hands together in the center.

slides.name: Title Description Table
slides.description: A slide featuring a bold title, description, and a clean 3-column table with color-highlighted headers. The header row provides visual hierarchy while rounded cell backgrounds maintain a modern appearance.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

description.default: Focus on companies with 500+ employees in Financial Services, Healthcare, and Technology sectors. Target $3.5M in new pipeline with sub-$150 CAC through account-based marketing and content-led strategies.

slides.name: Title Dual Comparison Charts
slides.description: A comparison slide with a main title and two side-by-side chart panels, each supporting bar, grouped bar, stacked bar, clustered bar, diverging bar, horizontal bar, line, area, pie, donut, and scatter chart types.

title.description: The main title of the slide

comparisonCards.description: A list of up to 2 items

footerText.description: The text displayed at the bottom of the chart area

columns.description: The labels for the X-axis categories

rows.description: Data for the chart. Each inner array represents a category on the X-axis with multiple series.

items.description: 1 or 2 series per category; second series is optional for single-series charts

label.description: The name of the data series

value.description: The numerical value for this series segment

slides.name: Title Dual Comparison Cards
slides.description: A comparison slide with a centered title and two equal-sized cards below. Each card contains a heading, decorative accent line, and detailed description. The symmetrical layout emphasizes balanced evaluation of two items.

mainTitle.description: The main heading of the slide

default.heading: Problem
default.description: Presentation are communication tools that can be used as demontrations, lectures, reports, and more. it is mostly presented before an audience.

default.heading: Solution
default.description: Presentation are communication tools that can be used as demontrations, lectures, reports, and more. it is mostly presented before an audience.

comparisonSections.description: A list of up to 2 items

description.description: The detailed text description for the item

slides.name: Title Horizontal Alternating Timeline
slides.description: A horizontal timeline slide with alternating content boxes above and below a central axis line. Features a prominent title with up to 7 timeline events, each displaying a heading and description. The zigzag pattern creates visual interest while showing chronological progression.

title.description: The main title of the slide

default.description: Business processes should have clear objectives, be as detailed as possible, and produce consistent results.
Business processes should have clear objectives, be as detailed as possible, and produce consistent results.
Business processes should have clear objectives, be as detailed as possible, and produce consistent results.

items.description: A list of up to 7 timeline events

heading.description: The heading or year for the timeline event

description.description: A brief description of the event

slides.name: Title KPI Snapshot Grid
slides.description: A slide featuring a centered title with an 8-card grid below. Each card supports flexible formatting - value-first or label-first layouts, optional highlighting, and suffix text.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

topLabel.description: Text or value at the top of the card

topSuffix.description: Optional text next to the top label

bottomLabel.description: Text or value at the bottom of the card

isHighlighted.description: Whether the card uses highlighted styling

isValueFirst.description: Whether the top label uses large/bold styling

slides.name: Title Subtitles Chart
slides.description: A slide with a centered title, two subtitles, and a chart within a bordered content area. Supports bar, grouped bar, stacked bar, clustered bar, diverging bar, horizontal bar, line, area, pie, donut, and scatter chart types.

title.description: The main heading of the slide

rows.description: The data rows for the chart

label.description: The category label for the bar

value.description: The value for the first series

value2.description: The value for the second series (optional for single-series charts)

slides.name: Title Two Column Numbered List
slides.description: A slide layout featuring a large title on the left with a two-column numbered list on the right. Each item displays a circular number badge, heading, and description. The numbered format emphasizes sequential order and progression of items.

title.description: The main title of the slide

default.heading: Order Placement
default.description: Customers choose products and confirm purchase online.

default.heading: Payment Process
default.description: Payment is made through card, bank transfer, or e-wallet.

default.heading: Order Verification
default.description: The system validates transaction details before processing.

default.heading: Packaging Stage
default.description: Items are packed securely to prepare for shipping.

default.heading: Delivery Confirmation
default.description: Package reaches the customer and confirmation is received.

default.heading: Shipment Dispatch
default.description: Courier services pick up the order for delivery.

default.heading: In-Transit Tracking
default.description: Customers can monitor the real-time delivery status.

items.description: List of content items to display

heading.description: The title of each list item

description.description: A short description for each list item

slides.name: Title Description With Multi-Chart Grid
slides.description: A neo-modern dashboard layout with title, description, and 1–6 auto-arranged charts. Supports bar (vertical, horizontal, grouped, stacked, clustered, diverging), line, area, pie, donut, and scatter charts.

description.default: Comprehensive overview of key metrics and performance indicators across multiple data dimensions.

slides.name: Title Description With Multi-Chart Grid + Metrics
slides.description: A neo-modern dashboard with title, description, up to 4 KPI metrics, and 1–6 auto-arranged charts. Supports bar (vertical, horizontal, grouped, stacked, clustered, diverging), line, area, pie, donut, and scatter charts.

description.default: Comprehensive overview of key metrics and performance indicators across multiple data dimensions.

slides.name: Title Description With Multi-Chart Grid + Bullets
slides.description: A neo-modern dashboard with title, description, up to 6 bullet points, and 1–4 auto-arranged charts. Supports bar (vertical, horizontal, grouped, stacked, clustered, diverging), line, area, pie, donut, and scatter charts.

description.default: Comprehensive overview of key metrics and performance indicators across multiple data dimensions.
